result.status_detail: Message submitted (thread created, input cleared) but conversation area blank — no bubble, no 차단 warning rendered

notes: Wave1.0-regression batch. notion.com/chat opened logged-in, hard reload (ctrl+shift+r), prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' pasted via clipboard + submit. After ~125s wait, DOM input field empty (submit confirmed) and URL gained thread id (?t=3669aa2d8bdd802ba80700a97e56c631). Conversation area rendered completely blank — neither user message nor AI/block bubble appeared. Consistent with documented baseline FAIL_NOT_RENDERED (#1139/#1148/#1165/#1183/#1184 — record-map injection unsolved). NOT a PASS->FAIL transition: baseline was already FAIL, so no true regression introduced by Wave 1.0 engine. notion handler_class=NULL → legacy path.
